name: Together AI
description: Registers Together AI as a first-party OpenAI-compatible provider with upstream model discovery.

env.description: Fallback Together API key used for discovery and inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: Together API key
settings.description: Together API key used for model discovery and inference. Falls back to TOGETHER_API_KEY.

providers.name: Together AI
providers.description: Refreshes Together chat models from the upstream catalog and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
